fields.buff_caption: open APIs, honest outputs for researchers
fields.cheems_caption: claude code hides 'deepseek' markers, degrades paying users

narrative_summary: Contrasts old-era open APIs with Anthropic's Claude Code secretly steganographically marking requests (checks for 'deepseek'), escalating to HN critics saying it 'literally commit[s] fraud'.
rationale: Candidate 4 is the only pitch where template and joke shape genuinely align — Buff Doge vs Cheems nails the then-vs-now degradation arc, contrasting open honest APIs with covert markers that hurt paying users, delivering a real punchline rather than restating the headline like the four 'This Is Fine' clones.
story_title: Claude Code Is Steganographically Marking Requests
place: at a funeral for a deprecated AI model
hat_pair: top hat with a tiny working cuckoo clock built into the brim
